name: Expansion Groups
description: Party/group system for team play with shared HUD, markers.
overview: Expansion Groups adds a comprehensive party system allowing players to form groups, share map markers, see each other's positions, and manage group permissions. It enhances cooperative gameplay and integrates with other Expansion mods for shared features like group chat and territory ownership.
installation: Add to your -mod= parameter after Core.

troubleshooting.solution: Ensure GroupPersistence is set to 1 and the database is configured.
Check that EnableGroupInvites is set to 1 and both players are online.

useCases.title: Small Squads
useCases.description: Set MaxGroupSize to 4-5 for tactical small-team gameplay.

useCases.title: Large Factions
useCases.description: Increase group size for faction-based servers with large teams.

quickSettings.name: MaxGroupSize
quickSettings.description: Maximum number of players per group.

quickSettings.name: EnableGroupHUD
quickSettings.description: Show group member info on the HUD.

quickSettings.name: EnableGroupMarkers
quickSettings.description: Allow group members to see shared markers.

useCases.description: Set MaxGroupSize to 4-5 for tactical small-team gameplay.
